ddls:
CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the respondent */,
  "education_status" TEXT /* Current education status of the respondent */,
  "frequency_of_carbon_friendly_choices" TEXT /* How often the respondent attempts to choose a more carbon-friendly alternative */,
  "challenges" TEXT /* Challenges that make it difficult for the respondent to reduce their environmental impact */,
  "motivators" TEXT /* Primary motivators for the respondent to pursue a more carbon-friendly lifestyle */,
  "challenge_participation" TEXT /* Whether the respondent would participate in a carbon reduction challenge */,
  "known_people_actively_green" TEXT /* Number of known people who actively find ways to integrate a more carbon-friendly lifestyle */,
  "carbon_friendly_activities" TEXT /* Carbon-friendly activities performed by the respondent and their known people */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, state, country) of the respondent */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "response_comments" TEXT /* Open-ended comments from the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_motivators FOREIGN KEY ("motivators") REFERENCES motivators ("motivator_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_carbon_friendly_activities FOREIGN KEY ("carbon_friendly_activities") REFERENCES carbon_friendly_activities ("activity_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_version FOREIGN KEY ("survey_version") REFERENCES survey_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_challenge_participation FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_participation") REFERENCES challenge_participation ("participation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_challenges FOREIGN KEY ("challenges") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_frequency_of_carbon_friendly_choices FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_of_carbon_friendly_choices") REFERENCES frequency_choices ("frequency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_known_people_actively_green FOREIGN KEY ("known_people_actively_green") REFERENCES known_people ("known_people_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_education_status FOREIGN KEY ("education_status") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_choices" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "challenge_description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motivators" (
  "motivator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motivator */,
  "motivator_name" TEXT /* Name of the motivator */,
  "motivator_description" TEXT /* Description of the motivator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motivator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation level */,
  "participation_name" TEXT /* Name of the participation level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "known_people" (
  "known_people_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each known people category */,
  "known_people_name" TEXT /* Name of the known people category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("known_people_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_friendly_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the respondent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Survey version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
